issues.detail: The skill file does not cover all possible error scenarios and edge cases for Symfony development.

scenarios.name: JSON User API with validation and serialization groups
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses #[Route] attributes, constructor-injected UserRepository/EntityManagerInterface/ValidatorInterface, ValidatorInterface->validate before persist, and #[Groups('user:list'/'user:detail')] to control serialization — all per the skill; baseline returns a generic controller without groups or validator integration.

scenarios.name: Dispatch welcome email asynchronously after signup
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines a Message class plus an #[AsMessageHandler] invokable handler and dispatches via $this->bus->dispatch(...) as specified in the skill; baseline reaches for raw queues or synchronous mailer without Messenger's pattern.
